text: Welcome to Sunshine English.
Hello.
How are you? I came here to meet you.
How is your health?
Tony,
what is she doing here? I don't want to
talk to her.
She wanted to meet you, Mom.
You can talk to her. I will bring tea
for you.
You can go. You are a bad girl. I don't
like you.
Tony and I love each other. We are going
to marry soon. You cannot do anything.
You are just a crazy lady.
How dare you call me crazy? I will tell
my son about it. I will not let him
marry you. You are very arrogant.
My son needs a loyal wife.
You cannot stop me. I will marry Tony.
You are a crazy old lady. You should be
in the mental asylum.
How dare you insult me? I will not let
you go.
I will kill you. Bad girl.
Tony, save me. Your mom has lost her
mind.
Mom, stop doing this. What are you
doing?
I don't like this girl. Take her away
from here. I will kill her today.
What happened? She came here to meet
you. Please calm down.
She is a bad girl. She will destroy your
life. Please, my son, don't marry her.
She does not respect me. Please don't
marry her.
She insulted me. She called me a crazy
lady. She wants to send me to the mental
asylum.
Jane, what is she saying? You insulted
my mom.
She is lying. I really respect her a
lot. I did not say anything.
I am not lying. Please, my son, don't
marry her. She will destroy your life.
We are leaving. Please mom, calm down.
You need to rest.
What is this? What do you think of
yourself?
I will not accept this marriage
contract. You are literally insulting
us.
You are overreacting. My dad told me to
give you this contract. What is the big
deal? Jane has to sign this contract. It
is just a formality. Tony will also sign
it. I also signed the marriage contract
when I married to Tony's grandpa.
Oh, please. We are not just like you.
You are a greedy girl. We are not. My
daughter is not a greedy girl. What do
you think of yourself?
You are insulting me right now. I will
not accept this. I love my husband a
lot.
Bella, listen to me carefully. My
daughter will not sign this contract. We
are not greedy people.
What is going on here?
Dad, your ex-lover brought this
contract. This contract says we are
greedy people. If Jane wants to marry
Tony, she has to sign this contract.
It is not like that. She is making a
mountain out of a molehill.
I got it. This is not right. Bella Jane
will decide it. It is her decision. Let
her come and think about it.
Are you okay, Jane? I am sorry. You know
my mom's health.
It is okay.
Can we go out right now? I am feeling
bored.
No, Jane. I want to stay alone. I am
going to my farmhouse. I will see you
later.
Okay,
I should go home then. See you later.
I need to talk to Tony.
He has to forget me.
He is not mine.
Zara, what are you doing here?
I came here to talk to you. Can we talk?
Yeah, sure. Let's go inside.
Zara, why are you ignoring me? I love
you. What do you want?
I cannot do this. This is our last
meeting. Please don't meet me again. We
cannot be together.
I really love you. I want to tell you
something. I got engaged.
Good. Congratulations.
We should not meet again. You are going
to marry soon. What am I doing here?
Goodbye forever. I don't want this
relationship.
What nonsense is this? I cannot accept
this. Who came here? This is ridiculous.
Bella came here. She brought this
contract. We are not greedy people. What
are you going to do? Will you marry
Tony? You don't need to sign this
contract. Enough is enough.
Tony has to pay for this. I need to talk
to him.
I should not have come here. I am going.
We will not meet again. You are going to
marry soon.
No, please don't go. I will fix
everything. I don't love her. I love
you. I want to stay with you.
Oh, really? Do you really love me? Can
you take off your engagement ring? I
don't need this relationship.
I cannot do this. I need some time.
Fine, I am going now. You can marry her.
Goodbye forever.
Tony, open the door. I know you are
inside. We need to talk. How could you
do this to me?
Oh no. Jane, what is she doing here? Oh
no.
I know you are here. Open the door. I
said open the door.
What should I do now? I should not have
come here.
You have to hide. Come with me. She can
see you here.
Where were you? Who is here? Are you
hiding something from me? I need to talk
to you. What took you so long?
I was in the washroom. Why are you
angry? Please calm down. What happened?
I know someone is here. What were you
doing here? Are you hiding something
from me? Is someone here? Were you here
with a girl?
Nobody is here.
What are you doing here?
I need to check your bedroom. I know
someone is here. I heard some voices.
Nobody is here. Why did you come here?
Why are you angry?
I have to find that girl. Where is she?
I will find her.
I know someone is here. Why is this door
locked? Who is here? Open the door.
Oh god, Zara is here. I will not unlock
the door. What should I do now? Jane is
crazy.
Hey girl, Tony is just mine. Who are
you? Are you scared? I want to talk to
you. I said open the door.
Oh god, help me. What should I do now?
Jane can see me here. She will kill me.
Jane, have you lost your mind? Why did
you come here? Why are you angry? I want
to know the reason.
Shut up. Where is the key? I want to
check this room. Why did you lock it? I
know you were here with a girl. I heard
some voices. Who is she? I will kill her
today. I said open the door.
I am Jane. You don't know me yet. Fine.
I will break this door.
Calm down. You don't need to break it. I
have a key of this room. Let me unlock
it.
Oh no, she is going to enter in this
room. She will see me.
Where is she? Is she a ghost? Where did
you hide her?
Enough is enough, Jane. You are driving
me crazy. I cannot tolerate this
behavior anymore.
Come with me. We need to talk right now.
Where is Zara? She hid in this room. She
must be here. I have to lock this room.
What is this? I did not get anything.
Who gave you this?
Your dear aunt met my mom today. She
brought this contract. This is our
marriage contract. I am not a greedy
girl. I will not sign this contract. Did
you know about it? How could you think
about me like this?
I did not even know about it. Let's go.
I will not sign it as well. I will talk
to my grandpa.
Why grandpa? We will not sign this
contract. You should have told me about
it.
I am doing it for you, Tony. What is the
big deal? You both have to sign this
contract.
I don't like this girl. Please, my son,
don't marry her. She will destroy you.
I want to ask something. Do you love
this girl?
Of course. He loves me. Tony, your mom
is asking something.
I know my son. He does not love you.
Why are you mute? I got it. Here is your
ring.
Oh god. She took off her engagement
ring. Please, Tony, go and talk to her.
What is going on here?
I was not expecting this from Jane. She
is a crazy girl.
Where are you Tony? Please open the
door. I am not feeling well here.
I want to go home. I don't want to stay
here.
Jane, where did you go? Did you meet
Tony? I am asking something.
Please, Mom, leave me alone. I don't
want to talk to anyone. I am not in a
good mood.
I want to know the reason. What
happened?
I did not sign that contract. I took off
the ring. It's over now. Are you happy
now?
Are you crazy? What do you think of
yourself? You have to marry Tony. You
ruined everything. You have been waiting
for him for years. Is this your love?
You talk to Tony.
I will not talk to him. He will come
here and apologize to me. He is just
mine.
Your dad boiled you a lot. You have
everything. You are a rich girl. You
have money. You have power.
Leave me alone. Mom, I don't want to
talk to you. Get out of my room.
I am your mom. I am not your maid. Don't
talk to me in this tone again. You have
ruined everything. I have spoiled you a
lot. I will fix everything. Marriage is
not a game. You will marry Tony. Just
wait and watch.
I will come back here again. You need
more slaps.
I was feeling suffocated here. Why Tony?
Why? I will not meet you again. Your
fianceé came here. She could have seen
me here. What are you trying to do?
I am sorry, Zara. I did not want this. I
love you. I know you love me as well.
I don't need this relationship.
I have to go now. I will not meet you
again. Goodbye, Tony.
Please don't go. Jane took off the
engagement ring. She is not my fianceé
anymore.
Yes, Dad. She took off the engagement
ring. What should we do now? Can you
talk to Tony's grandpa?
No way. I will not talk to him. He is an
arrogant old man. I know Jane loves
Tony. She has been waiting for him. She
is just angry now.
I can talk to my dad. He is my dad. I
will talk to him. We all need to calm
down.
Okay, Arya, you can go. We have to fix
this matter. Jane is my granddaughter. I
cannot see her sad.
Come on, Zara. Pick up the phone. Where
are you?
Excuse me, I have to take this call.
Okay, I am going to the living room. You
can take your time.
Hello, Kora. What happened? Is
everything okay?
Zara. Jane is very angry. She took off
her engagement ring. Everyone is upset.
Please don't come here today. Jane can
slap you again.
What? Okay, I got it. I will switch off
my phone today. Don't tell Jane about
me. I will not come home today.
Okay, don't worry. Take care.
Kora
Jane. Madam, how can I help you?
I want to know about Zara.
Where is she?
I know she is not at home. Do you know
about her?
She is not at home.
She was feeling sick. I think she went
to the hospital. Can I help you? Do you
need anything?
No,
I don't need anything.
Let me know when she comes.
Okay, madam. I will let you know.
Jane is not Tony's fianceé anymore. I
should give Tony a chance. I also love
him. I will talk to him.
Tony, I will give you one chance. Where
should we go? I will spend my day with
you. I want to know you better.
Really? Thank you so much. Let's go.
Hello dad. How are you? You know the
situation.
I am fine. Arya. Jane came here. She
took off the ring. What should I do now?
They don't want to sign this marriage
contract.
Dad, I need to talk to you about it.
Please forget about this contract.
You know us. I know Jane is an arrogant
girl, but she loves Tony a lot. She has
been waiting for him for the last 20
years. I know they will reconcile soon.
Jane misbehaved in front of us. She has
to apologize.
I will not talk to her family again. I
know that house is your in-laws.
I think we should meet tonight. I will
talk to Jane's mother.
We all should meet and talk. We have to
figure something out.
Okay, my daughter. I agree. We will meet
that family. You can talk to them.
Really? Thank you so much, Dad. I should
go now. Have a good day.
Thanks for the dinner. It was delicious.
I am glad you liked it. Zara, I want to
know you more. Where do you live? What
are you hobbies?
I will tell you about my hobbies. I like
nature. I like to spend time with you. I
like books. Don't forget this is our
last meeting. We will not meet again.
Why? I want to know about your life. I
just know your name. Who are you?
I am sorry. I cannot tell you. I am just
a maid. You will leave me forever. I
will not meet you again.
Good evening. Thanks for coming here
with your family. You know the matter.
Your granddaughter broke the engagement.
Who is responsible for this? You sent us
that marriage contract.
Jane is going through a lot.
Did you come here to argue? We need to
sit down and talk. Look at you. You will
never change.
I am fine. You will also never change. I
am still young. You are getting old day
by day.
Dad, please calm down. Let's sit there
and order food first. Let's go,
everyone.
I need to use the washroom. I will be
right back.
Okay.
Oh god, what are they doing here? I will
not stay here anymore. They can see me
here. Oh god, help me.
Sir, would you like some fresh juice?
No thanks. I am fine. I am just leaving.
Your family is here as well. They are
inside. Should I tell them about you?
What? No, no, don't tell them about me.
I am just leaving.
Okay, sir. Take care.
I have to go now. Zara is here as well.
My family can see me here.
Tony, can we go now?
Yeah, sure. Let's go.
Where are you? Zara, pick up the phone.
I will kill you.
You have to come home soon.
I am not good. Tony does not love me. I
need you. Zara,
you have to come soon.
Are you having fun here?
Yes, I think I am dreaming. Thanks
again. I will never forget this night. I
will miss you, Tony.
Can we not meet again? Is this really
our last meeting? I want to know you.
Who are you? I love you.
No, Tony. We will not meet again. This
is our last meeting. You are not single.
You are engaged.
I don't want this relationship.
I don't want to talk about it. It is
very special time for me.
Why is that? I will fix everything. I
like you. Who are you? I don't have your
mobile number as well.
I will tell you everything later. This
is not the right time.
Okay, I will not force you. I wish I
could stop this time. I feel great with
you. I have never felt like this before.
I hope we will meet again.
I told you my hobbies. What are your
hobbies?
Welcome, Zara. Thank god you weren't
here. Jane was very angry yesterday.
She broke her engagement.
Where were you? Did you meet your love?
Who is he?
It was just a dream, Kora. That was our
last meeting. I cannot tell you about
him. I will not meet him again.
Why is that? You love him. He also loves
you. Who is that boy?
I cannot tell you. I am going to my
bedroom. I will see you later.
Jane, what is she doing here? Did she
sleep here last night?
Zara, you came.
Thank God. It was a horrible night.
Let's go to my room.
Tony, where were you last night? I was
so worried about you. I am your aunt.
You can talk to me. We have to do
something. You need to talk to Jane. You
have to convince her.
I don't love her. I will not meet her.
She took off the ring. I am going to my
bedroom.
Are you in your senses? You have to
marry her. It was your decision. Jane is
crazy for you. We met her family last
night. She loves you a lot. Why are you
doing this to her?
I want to tell you something. I was with
a girl last night. I love her.
What? No. No. I know you are kidding.
How could you do this, Tony?
I am not kidding. I don't love Jane. I
love someone.
Where were you? I called you so many
times.
Your mobile phone was switched off.
My phone was dead. I am sorry. It won't
happen again.
I am not okay. Zara, I am in pain. Tony
does not love me. His mom asked him if
he loves me or not. He did not say
anything.
I cannot live without him. He is my
childhood love. My mom slapped me. I
have been waiting for him for years.
I will not meet Tony again. Jane is
crying for him. He will marry Jane soon.
Jane, I know he loves you. You should
call him. You have to meet him.
I think you are right. I will call him
right away.
I will meet Jane soon. I will tell her
everything. Please don't force me.
Hello, Jane. I want to meet you. Are you
at home?
Okay, I am coming. See you soon.
Tony, stop. What are you going to do?
Tony, thank God you came here. I hate
you a lot and I love you as well. I
cannot live without you. I am sorry.
I should not have done that. I am ready
to sign the marriage contract.
Jane, I want to tell you something. It
is really important. Please listen to
me.
Tony is standing here. I have to go in
front of him. I cannot hide myself
anymore.
He will marry Jane. I am just a maid. He
will forget me forever.
Tony,
what do you want to say?
I know you love me as well. I have been
waiting for you for years. Where is that
marriage contract?
I will sign that contract.
Please listen to me. I want to say
something really important.
Jane Madam
